description_long: This is a long-handled shovel featuring a straight, cylindrical wooden handle and a metallic blade. The blade is broad and flat with a slightly pointed tip, and it has a muted gray color, suggesting it is made of metal. The handle is a natural wood tone, smooth and unadorned, extending directly into the blade without any visible grip or ergonomic features. The blade is attached securely to the handle, with a reinforced collar at the joint for added durability. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding, decorative elements, or mounting hardware. The shovel appears clean and unused, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A straight-handled shovel with a wooden shaft and a broad, flat, gray metal blade. The design is simple, sturdy, and unmarked.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the flat, gray blade and the straight wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade and the handle's attachment point.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blade's thin edge and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle, smooth and unadorned
attribute_blade_type: Flat, broad, slightly pointed metal blade with a straight edge and reinforced collar
